channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FUSION] Fusion Finance FY26: AUM ₹7,407 Cr, Gross NPA at 3.21%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fusion Finance Ltd reported its financial results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026. The company's AUM grew to ₹7,407 crore, with gross NPA declining to 3.21%. Net Interest Margin (NIM) for Q4 FY26 expanded to 11.44%, and the average collection efficiency stood at 99.66%. The company reported a Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹114.19 crore in Q4 FY26, including a deferred tax asset recognition of ₹76.78 crore, leading to a full-year profitability of ₹13.9 Crore. The CRAR was healthy at 36.46%.

  • AUM grew to ₹7,407 crore as of March 2026, up 7.73% QoQ.
  • Gross NPA declined to 3.21% in Q4 FY26 from 4.38% in Q3 FY26.
  • Net Interest Margin (NIM) improved to 11.44% in Q4 FY26.
  • Q4 FY26 PAT stood at ₹114.19 crore, including deferred tax assets.
  • Capital Adequacy Ratio (CRAR) was reported at 36.46%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fusion Micro Finance Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [LGBFORGE] LGB Forge AGM: E-voting Cut-Off Date Fixed as August 7, 2026
item.description:
LGB Forge Ltd's board has set Friday, August 7, 2026, as the cut-off date to determine shareholders eligible for e-voting at the Annual General Meeting (AGM). The AGM is scheduled for Friday, August 14, 2026, via video conference. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Share transfer books will be closed from August 8 to August 14, 2026, for the AGM.

  • LGB Forge sets August 7, 2026, as e-voting eligibility cut-off for AGM.
  • AGM scheduled for August 14, 2026, via video conference.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Share transfer books closed from August 8-14, 2026, for AGM purposes.
  • Board meeting on May 16, 2026, approved financial results and AGM date.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LGB FORGE LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [MADHUVEER] JOJO Ltd: Recommends ₹0.05 Dividend, FY26 Results Approved
item.description:
JOJO Ltd's Board of Directors approved the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹0.05 per equity share (0.5%) of ₹10 each for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and audited by M/s Shah Sanghavi and Associates, Chartered Accountants, who issued an unmodified opinion.

  • Standalone and consolidated audited financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.05 per share recommended for FY26.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • Board Meeting commenced at 06.00 p.m. and concluded at 09.50 p.m.
  • Results reviewed by the Audit Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Madhuveer Com 18 Network Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RPOWER] Reliance Power: Monitoring Agency Report for March 2026
item.description:
Reliance Power Ltd's monitoring agency, Infomerics Valuation and Rating Limited, submitted its report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, regarding the utilization of proceeds from the preferential issue of warrants. The report, dated May 15, 2026, indicates no deviations from the stated objectives. The Audit Committee and Board of Directors reviewed the report, which was prepared in accordance with SEBI regulations.

  • Infomerics Valuation and Rating Limited is the monitoring agency.
  • The report covers the preferential issue of warrants.
  • No deviation from the objects of the issue was observed.
  • The report is for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The report was reviewed by the Audit Committee and Board of Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE POWER LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [APOLLO] Apollo Micro Systems: Monitoring Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Apollo Micro Systems Ltd submitted a Monitoring Agency Report by Acuite Ratings & Research Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report indicates no deviation from the objects of the preferential issue proceeds. The original cost of objects was ₹816.08 Cr, revised to ₹742.25 Cr due to receiving subscriptions for ₹742.25 Cr against the proposed ₹816.08 Cr.

  • Monitoring Agency Report submitted for quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • Acuite Ratings & Research Limited issued the report.
  • No deviation observed from the objects of the issue.
  • Original cost of objects revised to ₹742.25 Cr from ₹816.08 Cr.
  • Revision due to lower subscription amount received.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apollo Micro Systems Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [RUBICON] Rubicon Research Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Rubicon Research Ltd has released the Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report, issued by India Ratings & Research Private Limited on May 15, 2026, confirms no deviation from the objects of the IPO proceeds utilization. The management has reviewed the report, which will be presented to the Audit Committee and the Board at their upcoming meetings alongside year-end financial results. The IPO included a fresh issue of ₹5,000 Million and an offer for sale of ₹8,775.00 Million.

  • Monitoring Agency Report confirms no deviation from IPO objectives.
  • India Ratings & Research Private Limited issued the report on May 15, 2026.
  • Report will be presented to the Audit Committee and the Board.
  • IPO included a fresh issue of ₹5,000 Million.
  • Statutory Auditor Certificate issued by Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rubicon Research Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ICICIGI] ICICI Lombard: ₹7 Dividend Recommended; TDS Communication Sent
item.description:
ICICI Lombard's board recommended a final dividend of ₹7 per equity share (70% of face value ₹10) for FY2026, subject to shareholder approval at the AGM on June 19, 2026. The record date is May 29, 2026, and the dividend payout will be on or before July 3, 2026. The company communicated to shareholders regarding Tax Deduction at Source (TDS) on the dividend, as per the Income-tax Act, 2025, amended by the Finance Act, 2026. TDS rates vary based on residency and submitted documents, with a higher rate if a valid PAN is not provided. The last date for submission of tax-related documents is June 2, 2026.

  • ICICI Lombard recommends a final dividend of ₹7 per share for FY2026.
  • AGM is scheduled for June 19, 2026, to approve the dividend.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is May 29, 2026.
  • Dividend payout is expected on or before July 3, 2026.
  • TDS will be deducted as per Income-tax Act, 2025, with rates varying based on shareholder status and documentation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [FUSION] Fusion Finance Approves Amended Code of Practices
item.description:
Fusion Finance Ltd's board approved the amended code of practices and procedures for fair disclosure of unpublished price sensitive information, as per Regulation 8(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The updated code is available on the company's website.

  • Fusion Finance board approves amended code of practices.
  • The approval is in compliance with SEBI regulations.
  • The updated code is available on the company website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fusion Micro Finance Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [TREEHOUSE] Tree House Education Reports Net Loss of ₹996.92 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tree House Education & Accessories Ltd. announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results. The standalone profit and loss account shows a loss after tax of ₹996.92 lakhs for the year ended March 31, 2026. The consolidated profit and loss account reveals a loss after tax of ₹1,006.72 lakhs for the same period. Both standalone and consolidated results indicate a challenging financial year for the company.

  • Standalone loss after tax is ₹996.92 lakhs for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Consolidated loss after tax is ₹1,006.72 lakhs for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Standalone revenue from operations is ₹399.10 lakhs for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Consolidated revenue from operations is ₹399.10 lakhs for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Basic and diluted EPS after exceptional items is (₹1.44).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TREE HOUSE EDUCATION & ACCESSORIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IRIS] IRIS RegTech to Incorporate UAE Subsidiary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IRIS RegTech Solutions Ltd's board approved the incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary in the United Arab Emirates to expand its footprint in the Middle East and strengthen global operations. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, re-appointed internal auditors and Whole Time Directors, approved the Annual Secretarial Compliance Report, approved the closure of a foreign subsidiary (Atanou S.R.L.), approved shifting of books of account and registered office.

  • IRIS RegTech will establish a wholly-owned subsidiary in the UAE.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 were approved by the board.
  • M/s. M. P. Chitale & Co. re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.
  • Closure of foreign subsidiary, Atanou S.R.L., approved for streamlining.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Balachandran Krishnan and Ms. Deepta Rangarajan as Whole Time Directors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRIS Business Services Ltd | Category: Subsidiary
